summary: PLINTH is a modernist furniture studio site presenting a tight seven-piece collection of seating, tables, and lighting with a strict monochrome, editorial aesthetic.

pages.title: Home
pages.purpose: Brand hero, philosophy, featured collection, stats and stockist call to action.

pages.title: Collection
pages.purpose: The complete seven-piece catalogue indexed and grouped by seating, tables, and light.

pages.title: Fold 01 Chair
pages.purpose: Individual product detail for the Fold 01 lounge chair with gallery, finishes, specification and care.

pages.title: Craft
pages.purpose: Materials, workshop process, and the repair-first guarantee.

pages.title: Studio
pages.purpose: Brand story, philosophy, working principles, founders and timeline.

pages.title: Stockists
pages.purpose: Stockist directory, trade information, contact form and FAQ.
